name: Anna Jihad F.
content: Saladin is a motivated, forward thinking & also intelligent UI Designer with lots of knowledge in his field. Proactive, energetic & totally organized. Saladin always maintains very good relation with co-workers & clients. He learns quickly and I would have no hesitation in working with Saladin once again in the future.

name: Cokorda Gde Dwipa Susila
content: Saladin is a rare & outstanding talent I have ever worked with. I've worked with him to develop UI/UX for an app & website. I was very impressed with his ability to translate a brief requirement into an awesome UI/UX design. He was always able to complete the task in a timely manner or even faster than the expected target. Great manner & professionalism during our cooperation.

name: Anas Al-Suhaim
content: I have been consistently impressed with Saladin's talents, efficiency, & ability to get things done. I believe that he would be an excellent addition to your design projects. Saladin constantly seeks to learn more about illustration, UI/UX trends & latest tools in the industry & also a quick learner who picks up new technology with great speed.

name: Armando Chandra
content: The quality of the deliverables produced was satisfactory as Saladin did manage to complete the project within a relatively short period of time given the urgency of the project. Given the numerous requests from us, Saladin remained professional throughout the project & responded to our inputs in a structured manner in Figma.

name: Mubarak Al-Nabit
content: Very creative and resourceful. I give 10/10 for the service provided by Saladin. He is very communicative, good collaboration and all managed very properly. I worked with Saladin to build a mobile app, dashboard for back office & website landing page, all done very well. Highly recommended for those who want "creativity".

name: Iman Fathy
content: I've had the pleasure of working with Saladin, and what stands out most is his creativity and genuine curiosity. He asks thoughtful questions to truly understand the problem before designing solutions, which makes a real difference in the quality of his work. He's hardworking, dependable, and always ready to step in when needed. What I admire most is his mindset — he sees every challenge as a chance to learn and grow. Any team would be lucky to have him.

name: Kamel Gamal Eltayar
content: All things he had from innovation side and ability to impress and being creative.

name: Soliman Ahmed
content: I have worked with Saladin for more than one year. He always provides useful UI/UX solutions based on a deep understanding of the problems he works on. I was very lucky to collaborate with him on many product solutions, where he delivered outstanding results.

name: Abdullah Al Ashikh
content: Saladin is a very great person with imagination. His soul is pure, and I enjoy interacting with him during design sessions. He should continue developing his creativity and focus more on design systems.

name: Mohamed AbdelHamid
content: Saladin is a talented and passionate designer who brings real value to any product he works on. His attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of user experience stand out. Working with him makes a noticeable difference in both the quality of the product and the overall workflow.

name: Reza Levi Fauzi
content: Highly proactive. Overall, Saladin has a strong understanding of the Adsol business model.

name: Merlin Detalina
content: Saladin very respect with all question that asked to him about his UX proposal flow. Saladin has a good curiosity and critical thinking. He can find the root cause and able to do a research to make his proposal flow stronger.

name: Amanda Kalpikasari
content: Provides updates, shows empathy, and understands user pain points.

name: Sasqia Azizah
content: Saladin, thank you so much! It's sad that the time was so short. I wish the engagement could have been extended.

name: Juan Lesmana
content: Saladin adapts very quickly in learning new things. Very proactive and well-prepared. Well done. Really enjoy working with you.

name: Alhamsya Bintang Dyasta
content: Works quickly and understands the finance business model fast.

name: Raden Bregas Dwi Hatmojo
content: The overall procurement plan is easy to understand, and Saladin is able to provide advice. Good communication skills and clear guidelines. Thanks for the spirit.

name: Christyan Aditya
content: Saladin has strong technical knowledge. From an engineer's point of view, it is easy to give input and brainstorm with Saladin.

name: Rahma Septeyani
content: Fast learner, communicative, proactive.

name: Katherina Denistia
content: Keep up the spirit, Saladin. Thank you for supporting the AP team so far. We look forward to working with you again in future finance projects.

name: Reza Z. Ramadhan
content: Growth mindset, communicative, and high ownership. Saladin is well-prepared when organizing meetings.
